validated_commands.build_note: Full workspace build requires goose git dep (network blocked in CI); persistence crate builds/tests independently. sccache not available in sandbox - unset RUSTC_WRAPPER.

open_prs.title: [Perf Improver] Add updated_at indexes for listing/dashboard queries (O(N log N) → O(LIMIT))
[Perf Improver] Add OrchestrationStore Criterion benchmarks (measurement baseline for index PR #321)
open_prs.note: PR number pending - submitted via safeoutputs. Benchmark-only PR; no prod code changes.

merged_prs.title: [Perf Improver] SQLite PRAGMA tuning: ~12x write throughput improvement in WAL mode
[Perf Improver] Add Criterion benchmarks to opengoose-persistence
[Perf Improver] Atomic append_message: single WAL commit per message write
[Perf Improver] SQLite mmap_size PRAGMA: memory-mapped reads (128 MiB)
[Perf Improver] INSERT RETURNING in schedule/trigger/plugin create (−1 SQL round-trip each)
[Perf Improver] INSERT RETURNING in WorkItemStore::create (−1 SQL round-trip)

optimization_backlog.title: updated_at indexes for sessions and orchestration_runs listing queries
optimization_backlog.notes: list_sessions(), export_sessions(), list_runs() all ORDER BY updated_at DESC without an index. dashboard.rs uses limit=i64::MAX. Migration adds idx_sessions_updated_at, idx_or_updated_at, idx_or_status_updated_at. 290 tests pass.

optimization_backlog.title: OrchestrationStore Criterion benchmarks
optimization_backlog.notes: Baseline: or_create_run ~15µs, or_complete_run ~7.4µs, or_list_runs_all/10 ~18µs, /50 ~71µs, /200 ~288µs. Provides measurement baseline for PR #321 index impact.

optimization_backlog.title: Cache recent session history in memory
optimization_backlog.notes: load_history() hits SQLite on every Goose agent invocation. An LRU cache per session would avoid repeated reads for TUI refresh and streaming engine. dashmap already in workspace deps. Cache invalidation on append_message(). Single load_history() per request so less urgent than initially thought.

perf_notes: Full workspace build downloads goose from GitHub (network blocked). Use -p opengoose-persistence for local work. Unset RUSTC_WRAPPER (sccache not available in sandbox).
SQLite synchronous=NORMAL in WAL mode is safe and ~12x faster for per-commit writes. PR #39 merged.
libsqlite3-sys with bundled feature - SQLite version is bundled, no system SQLite dependency.
Criterion benchmarks baselines (in-memory WAL): append_message ~15-17µs, get_active_team ~1µs, load_history(10) ~6µs, load_history(50) ~28-30µs, set_active_team ~9µs.
In-memory SQLite doesn't show mmap benefit - file-based workloads gain from mmap_size on repeated page reads.
conn.transaction() requires PersistenceError: From<diesel::result::Error> which is already implemented.
returning_clauses_for_sqlite_3_35 feature already in workspace - INSERT RETURNING works and is used widely.
As of 2026-03-13, all INSERT+last_insert_rowid() patterns in persistence crate have been replaced with INSERT RETURNING.
sessions and orchestration_runs tables lacked updated_at indexes - dashboard queries do full-table scans (PR #321).
dashboard.rs calls list_runs(None, i64::MAX) - this is O(N) without an index on updated_at.
OrchestrationStore bench baselines (in-memory WAL): or_create_run ~15µs, or_complete_run ~7.4µs, or_fail_run ~7.3µs, or_list_runs_all/10 ~18µs, /50 ~71µs, /200 ~288µs.
list_session_metrics() is defined in persistence but never called in prod code - only in tests. Not a hot path.
SessionStore::stats() is called on every dashboard request - does a full JOIN + GROUP BY aggregation; covered indirectly by web bench load_dashboard.
